case_title: RAYMOND STNLEY VS. RAYMOND STANLEY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-08-2012 CONTINUED TO JUL-25-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STNLEY, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT STANLEY, RAYMOND EXECUTOR OF ESTATE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-08-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-24-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-25-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-28-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
